executive_summary.verdict: NVO is trading BELOW Lynch fair value despite being the Ozempic leader. Rare opportunity in a secular growth story.
executive_summary.key_insight: Lynch $90 vs Price $51 = 77% below fair value. Obesity drug market exploding.

graham.recommendation: Graham not applicable - high-growth pharma doesn't fit value framework

5Y.analysis: Lynch grew from $30 to $90 as Ozempic revenue exploded

10Y.analysis: Consistent growth trajectory, accelerating with GLP-1 boom

peter_lynch.recommendation: 77% below Lynch - exceptional value for the growth rate

dcf.recommendation: DCF less reliable for high-growth pharma with uncertain patent timelines

risk_factors.competition: Eli Lilly (Mounjaro/Zepbound) is the main threat

bull_case.thesis: Obesity epidemic + GLP-1 adoption = secular growth story. Supply catches up.

bear_case.thesis: Lilly takes market share. Pricing pressure. Side effect concerns.
